data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the retainage release trigger upon 100% completion.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the functionality of the retainage release trigger. While the use case describes a scenario where retainage is released, it does not provide concrete evidence of the underlying API or system behavior that would validate this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no direct evidence to support the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for triggering retainage release upon 100% completion.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the retainage release trigger upon 100% completion.
